calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - CHRISTIAN NUNEZ, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.


RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OTHER PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS denied. Even assuming the bank funds could be traced to earnings, the amount of the judgment is less than the 25 percent that would be available to the judgment creditor. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul K. Lee, Esq. appeared appeared for plaintiff 400 Alemany Boulevard Homeowners Association.
Jose Uribe, Homeowners Association President, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Christian O. Nunez, Evelyn M. Perez or Jose Elisio Moreno.
Defaults were entered against defendants on May 28, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on May 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 400 Alemany Boulevard Homeowners Association, and against the Defaulted Defendants Christian O. Nunez, Evelyn M. Perez and Jose Elisio Moreno as follows:

Past-Due Regular Assessments and Late Charges - $6,277.80.
Attorney Fees - 1,290.00.
Costs - $851.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $6,277.80.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff's assessment lien is foreclosed, and sale of the subject real property by the Sheriff of San Francisco County is hereby ordered.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
